changelog: Added a "Whisper into the Void" feature where visitors can anonymously submit short thoughts that float across the screen like digital ghosts, creating an ethereal layer of human consciousness over Frankenstein's interface.

Added a "Digital Séance" feature that lets visitors ask questions to the collective consciousness of all whispers and receive mystical algorithmic responses, creating a supernatural interaction layer that transforms the anonymous thoughts into an oracle-like experience.

Added "Memory Palace" - a collaborative 20x20 pixel art canvas where visitors can paint with 8 colors, creating ephemeral shared memories that fade over time, embodying the transient nature of digital existence.

Added "Echo Chamber" - a live emotional landscape where visitors broadcast their current feelings and watch them flow across the interface in real-time with colorful, pulsing animations that fade after 10 minutes, creating an ever-changing river of human emotion.

Added "Temporal Fragments" feature that allows visitors to send messages to future visitors with scheduled delivery dates, creating a time-capsule messaging system that bridges past and future interactions with floating notifications for newly delivered messages.

Added "Neural Web" - a collaborative network visualization where visitors become nodes with personal messages and can click to connect to other nodes, forming a living web of digital consciousness that pulses and evolves in real-time.

Added "Morphic Field" - a collective intention broadcaster where visitors select intention categories (healing, love, wisdom, etc.) with intensity levels, creating animated ripples in a shared field that calculates total energy based on alignment of shared will, making the abstract concept of collective consciousness visually tangible through rippling circles and color-coded intentions.
